to.desc: Denotes the target route of the link. When clicked, the value of the to prop will be passed to router.push() internally.
to.desc_cn: 表示链接的目标路由。点击后，to 的值会作为 router.push() 的参数

replace.desc: Setting replace prop will call router.replace() instead of router.push() when clicked.
replace.desc_cn: 设置 replace 属性后，点击链接时会调用 router.replace() 而不是 router.push()

active-class.desc: Class to apply when the link is active.
active-class.desc_cn: 链接激活时应用的 class

exact-active-class.desc: Class to apply when the link is exactly active.
exact-active-class.desc_cn: 链接精确激活时应用的 class

aria-current-value.desc: Value passed to the attribute aria-current when the link is exactly active.
aria-current-value.desc_cn: 链接精确激活时传递给 aria-current 属性的值

custom.desc: Whether RouterLink should not wrap its content in an <a> tag.
custom.desc_cn: RouterLink 是否不将其内容包装在 <a> 标签中

default.desc: Content of the link. Can use scoped slot for custom rendering.

route.desc_cn: 解析后的标准化路由位置

isExactActive.desc: Whether the link is exactly active

default.desc_cn: 链接的内容。可以使用作用域插槽进行自定义渲染
